content.opening_paragraph: We are pleased to present our comprehensive uniform solution designed specifically for the hospitality sector.
content.body_paragraph_1: Our team at AFC specializes in bespoke hospitality uniforms with over 15 years of experience serving luxury establishments across Europe.
content.body_paragraph_2: We propose a three-phase approach: Design & Concept (4 weeks), Sample Production (4 weeks), and Full Production & Delivery (8 weeks). Complete investment: £23,000.
content.closing_paragraph: We would welcome the opportunity to discuss this proposal further and answer any questions you may have. Please feel free to contact us at your convenience.
